name: Salesforce Active Accounts Missing Email
description: Detects active salesforce accounts missing an email address for identity matching and offboarding controls.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name FROM salesforce_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.is_active, true) = true AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.email), '') = ''
remediation: Populate a valid corporate email on the account or disable the account until ownership can be verified.
